title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, discusses decision-making under uncertainty drawn from competitive sailing and argues that ad-based monetization, not subscriptions, is the sustainable model for AI tools. He also identifies human trust, not technological limitations, as the primary bottleneck for AI agent adoption.
